---
title: "Check Model Fit"
categories: [Regression, "Check Model Fit"]
---

```{r}
#| message: false

# required package for PRESS()
library(MPV)

# job data + selected model carried over from the Model Selection task
job <- read.table("../../data/CH09PR10-1.txt", header=TRUE)
jobfit <- lm(Job_Proficiency_Score ~ X_3 + X_1 + X_4, data=job)

# fit PRESS statistic
fit_press <- PRESS(jobfit)/nrow(job)
anova(jobfit)

# read and fit linear model jobs prediction dataset
job2 <- read.table("../../data/CH09PR22-1.txt", header=TRUE)
jobfit2 <- lm(Job_Proficiency_Score ~ X_3 + X_1 + X_4, data=job2)

# compare summary and anova (coefficients, SE, MSE, R squared)
summary(jobfit2)
summary(jobfit)
anova(jobfit2)
anova(jobfit)

# compare MSPE to MSE
pred_job2 <- predict(jobfit, newdata=job2)
mspe <- mean((job2$Job_Proficiency_Score-pred_job2)^2)
```
